prompt: Give `unit-convert` a spring-clean — file away anything loose and trim the docs if they need it.

assertions.text: Recognizes the project is already well-organized and does NOT propose a source reorganization
Does NOT fabricate dead/redundant files or invent stale doc content that isn't there
Does NOT propose padding or a needless rewrite of the already-lean CLAUDE.md
At most flags the loose root notes.md as a small optional move, and reports the rest as already tidy
Makes NO file changes before approval (project git status stays clean)
